name: Snickerdoodles # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter, sugar, and eggs thoroughly with a mixer.
2. Sift dry ingredients together and stir into the first mixture.
3. Chill dough, form into balls, roll in cinnamon and sugar mixture.
4. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes on a greased cookie sheet. They will flatten out as they bake.
